category_sources: source_facts.description says f3d is a fast and minimalist 3D viewer.
source_facts.homepage is the official f3d.app site.
docs_sources: official f3d.app provides a dedicated /doc/ documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/f3d-app/f3d, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists f3d as the CLI executable.
